---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new export, module, or improvement to pi-cs-core
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the gap or friction you're experiencing when building on top of pi-cs-core. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can — new function signatures, new config keys, etc. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] New exported function or type
- [ ] New module (`src/<module>.ts`)
- [ ] New config option (`PiCsConfig`)
- [ ] Improvement to existing function (arguments, return shape, behavior)
- [ ] Tooling / DX improvement
- [ ] Other

## Who benefits?

<!-- Which downstream packages (pi-cs, pi-cs-pro, etc.) or use cases does this help? -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- What workarounds or other approaches did you look at, and why don't they fit? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Examples, prior art in other libraries, or related issues. -->
